# arena Provider



## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    arena = {
      source = "arena-io/arena"
    }
  }
}

provider "arena" {
  server_url = "http://localhost:18080/api/v1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `server_url` (String) Server URL
